## Calculations.STANDARD\_FRACTIONS variable

Standard fractions supported for tsp/Tbsp display. Ordered by decimal value for efficient searching.

**Signature:**

```typescript
STANDARD_FRACTIONS: ReadonlyArray<IFraction>
```
